title: RFID Tag
description: Schema representing an RFID tag read from a reader, including EPC, RSSI, and metadata

epc.description: Electronic Product Code in hex or URN format

epcUrn.description: EPC in URN form per GS1 Tag Data Standard

tidBank.description: Tag Identifier memory bank (unique per chip)

rssi.description: Received Signal Strength Indicator in dBm

antennaId.description: Antenna port ID on the reader that detected the tag

readerSerial.description: Serial number of the RFID reader

readerHostname.description: Hostname or IP of the RFID reader

readCount.description: Number of times this tag was read in a session
